author: doll-agent
content: Add 'aligned' field to ArrayFlags (numpy NPY_ARRAY_ALIGNED equivalent) and populate it in all 5 flags() impls: Array (introspect.rs), ArrayView, ArrayViewMut, ArcArray, CowArray. Owned/Arc/Cow paths go through Vec<T>'s allocator (guaranteed aligned, so true). View paths verify ((ptr as usize) % align_of::<T>()) == 0 for the head-of-buffer pointer (catches misaligned from_shape_ptr). 2 tests covering owned and various dtypes.
